Leadership
in Practice

with Frenetta Tate

Most leadership problems are system problems. After fifteen years inside complex organizations — building systems, developing leaders, and closing the gap between vision and execution — I created this space to put the thinking behind that work into writing. If you are ready to move beyond surface-level frameworks and into what actually produces results, you are in the right place.
